apifyToken.title: Apify API Token
apifyToken.description: Your Apify API token. Used to fetch analytics data and send the email report.

emailTo.title: Report Email Address
emailTo.description: Email address to deliver the HTML report to. Leave empty to skip sending. If you are on the free plan, use your email which is connected to your Apify account otherwise the email sending will reject it.

snapshotStoreName.title: Snapshot Store Name
snapshotStoreName.description: Name of the named Key-Value Store used for persistent snapshots across runs.

compareDate.title: Compare Against Date (YYYY-MM-DD)
compareDate.description: Optional. Compare today's snapshot against a specific past date instead of yesterday. Useful for month-start baselines or investigating a specific historical point. Format: YYYY-MM-DD.

snapshotRetentionDays.title: Snapshot Retention (days)
snapshotRetentionDays.description: Snapshots older than this many days are automatically deleted from the Key-Value Store to prevent unbounded growth. Minimum 7 days. Default: 30 days.
